title: Media Gallery
text:
NOMARS:
At-sea Demo
August 2025
The USX-1 Defiant's christening ceremony took place on Aug. 11, at Everett Ship Repair in Everett, Washington.
Key images from the NOMARS program and Defiant at-sea demonstration are shared here in high-resolution. Media are encouraged to use these images with credit, in line with DARPA's usage policy.
Reach out to the DARPA Public Affairs Office with any questions.
